details.message: Expected top-level directory memory_bank/ is missing. Only MEMORY_BANK.md file exists at repo root. All other expected directories (src/, scripts/, reports/, docs/, validation/, .cursor/) exist. reports/audit/ and reports/board/ exist.

moltbot/ directory exists with active Python code: sentinel.py, board.py, promotion_discipline.py, orchestrator.py, memory_evolution.py, __init__.py. Additionally, molt-related scripts found: scripts/run_molt_workflow.py, scripts/run_molt_intelligence_expansion.py, scripts/run_openclaw_molt_synthesis.py. MEMORY_BANK.md still references moltbot/ as active workflow infrastructure (sections on Learning Orchestrator, Engineering Sentinel, Multi-Agent Learning Board, Promotion Discipline, Memory Bank Evolution). Governance policy requires these to be removed or formally re-approved.

github_issue.note: Multiple open issues exist (#87-#96). Latest is #96. Token lacks write access to comment.
